Package com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    StructViewFactory<T extends PStruct>
    Creates typed views over struct array elements.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    PStruct
    A typed view over one struct element; subclass it and expose named accessors.
    PStructArray<T extends PStruct>
    A fixed-length native struct array; fields are read through StructField handles or typed views.
    PStructArray2D<T extends PStruct>
    A fixed-shape 2D struct array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PStructWriter<T extends PStruct>
    A forward-only writer handing out views over a PStructArray.
